title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY testing 159.23 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long positioning at 77.3% — institutional long bias, watch for potential squeeze if EUR/USD breaks below 1.1769.

title: AUD/USD Retail Sentiment
text: AUD/USD at 87% short bias — extreme retail short positioning, contrarian reversal risk if AUD/USD breaks above 0.7099.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 19.1 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +1.02%.

title: USD/JPY vs VIX Correlation Break
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation at +0.655 — JPY no longer acting as safe haven, watch for regime shift implications.
